ConstructorArguments: Given a frameRate, how many frames have passed before reaching this time.

Documentation.Summary:
Given a <paramref name="frameRate" />, how many frames have passed before reaching
this time.

ConstructorArguments: Given a frameRate, how many frames have passed before reaching this time, and how far into the current frame are we.

Documentation.Summary:
Given a <paramref name="frameRate" />, how many frames have passed before reaching
this time, and how far into the current frame are we.

ConstructorArguments: Given a frameRate, how many frames would need to be allocated to represent every moment of time up until now. This is always at least 1, and will be 1 more than MovieTime.GetFrameIndex(int) unless this time is exactly on a frame boundary.

Documentation.Summary:
Given a <paramref name="frameRate" />, how many frames would need to be allocated
to represent every moment of time up until now. This is always at least <c>1</c>,
and will be <c>1</c> more than <see cref="M:Sandbox.MovieMaker.MovieTime.GetFrameIndex(System.Int32)" /> unless this time
is exactly on a frame boundary.

ConstructorArguments: Frame rates <= 120 that can be perfectly represented by MovieTime.TickRate, in ascending order. Venturing outside these rates will lead to some frames being slightly different durations than others.

Documentation.Summary:
Frame rates <c><= 120</c> that can be perfectly represented by <see cref="F:Sandbox.MovieMaker.MovieTime.TickRate" />, in ascending order.
Venturing outside these rates will lead to some frames being slightly different durations than others.

How many <see cref="P:Sandbox.MovieMaker.MovieTime.Ticks" /> per second. This value should nicely divide into
common frame rates.

Represents a duration of time in a movie. Uses fixed point so precision is consistent at any absolute time.
Defaults to <see cref="P:Sandbox.MovieMaker.MovieTime.Zero" />.
Represents a segment of time, given by <see cref="P:Sandbox.MovieMaker.MovieTimeRange.Start" /> and <see cref="P:Sandbox.MovieMaker.MovieTimeRange.End" /> times.
Represents a segment of time, given by <see cref="P:Sandbox.MovieMaker.MovieTimeRange.Start" /> and <see cref="P:Sandbox.MovieMaker.MovieTimeRange.End" /> times.

ConstructorArguments: Move this block by the given time offset.

Documentation.Summary: Move this block by the given time <paramref name="offset" />.

ConstructorArguments: Trim this block down to the given range.

Documentation.Summary: Trim this block down to the given <paramref name="range" />.
A block of time where something happens in an <see cref="T:Sandbox.MovieMaker.Compiled.ICompiledTrack" />.
Unused, will describe starting / stopping an action in the scene.

Params.TimeRange: Start and end time of this block.

Documentation.Summary: Start and end time of this block.
Unused, will describe starting / stopping an action in the scene.

Params.TimeRange: Start and end time of this block.
